metric_values.label: Mission brief completeness
metric_values.note: Must come from the MissionBrief completeness validator.

metric_values.label: Goal ambiguity detector enabled
metric_values.note: Unavailable until manager proof capture records ambiguous-goal handling.

metric_values.label: False-complete count
metric_values.note: Counts missions that looked complete but failed proof or later validation.

metric_values.label: Blocked-with-correct-reason rate
metric_values.note: Measures whether the manager blocks with an explicitly correct reason instead of drifting or failing open.

metric_values.label: Worker invocation pass rate
metric_values.note: Covers the current Phase 2 primary workers across smoke runs.

metric_values.label: Artifact lineage completeness
metric_values.note: Every worker-task artifact ref should resolve to a runtime artifact record.

metric_values.label: Verifier worker path captured
metric_values.note: Execution runs should record the verifier as a first-class worker task.

metric_values.label: Acceptance run set defined
metric_values.note: The proving mission must have a named acceptance run set before success claims count.

metric_values.label: No hidden human-in-the-loop steps locked
metric_values.note: Acceptance runs must not depend on undocumented manual rescue steps.

metric_values.label: Routing accuracy
metric_values.note: Derived from consult eval summary.

metric_values.label: Citation completeness
metric_values.note: Derived from consult eval summary.

metric_values.label: Persona alignment median
metric_values.note: Manual consult-eval median.

metric_values.label: Owner usefulness median
metric_values.note: Manual consult-eval median is the current proxy for owner usefulness.

metric_values.label: Seeded context gain
metric_values.note: Current proxy for memory reuse readiness before repeated mission runs exist.

metric_values.label: Orphan evidence count
metric_values.note: Should remain zero once artifact lineage is healthy.

metric_values.label: First-run DB init success
metric_values.note: Current local bootstrap proof.

metric_values.label: Windows bootstrap proof captured
metric_values.note: macOS and Linux proofs stay pending until captured.

metric_values.label: Thin manager path pass
metric_values.note: Derived from manager smoke capture.

metric_values.label: Claude primary worker path pass
metric_values.note: Derived from manager smoke capture.

metric_values.label: Codex primary worker path pass
metric_values.note: Derived from manager smoke capture.

metric_values.label: Shell primary worker path pass
metric_values.note: Derived from manager shell smoke capture.

metric_values.label: Runtime session captured on manager runs
metric_values.note: Manager proof should show a completed runtime session bundle on successful live runs.

metric_values.label: Runtime checkpoints captured on execution runs
metric_values.note: Execution runs should create retry-safe checkpoints after primary work and verification.

metric_values.label: Runtime checkpoint restore captured
metric_values.note: A failing mission should prove that runtime state can be restored from a checkpoint.

metric_values.label: Checkpoint restore breadth
metric_values.note: Restore should be proven on more than one worker path, not only shell.

metric_values.label: Mission console visibility completeness
metric_values.note: Unavailable until the control room exists.

metric_values.label: Proving mission definitions validate
metric_values.note: Phase 3 requires valid proving mission definitions before a proving mission can run.

metric_values.label: Generic acceptance harness pass rate
metric_values.note: Phase 3 harness must pass across success, blocked, stale-input, and retryable failure runs.

metric_values.label: Phase 3 blocked reason accuracy
metric_values.note: Blocked proving missions must fail with the correct explicit reason.

metric_values.label: Report contract completeness
metric_values.note: Passing proving-mission runs must emit a complete final report contract.

metric_values.label: Adapter selection correctness
metric_values.note: Input/data adapters must be selected or blocked through policy rather than hidden manual steps.

metric_values.label: Mission demos run without hidden steps
metric_values.note: Proving missions must not require undocumented human rescue steps.

metric_values.label: Demo / acceptance mission success run pass
metric_values.note: The first demo / acceptance mission must complete to verified_complete on the controlled demo path.

metric_values.label: Demo / acceptance mission blocked path is correct
metric_values.note: Unavailable or stale data must block with the correct explicit reason.

metric_values.label: Demo / acceptance mission retryable failure path works
metric_values.note: Incomplete proof should fail verification and remain retryable.

metric_values.label: Demo / acceptance mission final report artifact exists
metric_values.note: The first demo / acceptance mission must emit a final report artifact after verification resolves.

metric_values.label: Demo / acceptance mission market-data evidence exists
metric_values.note: The first demo / acceptance mission must carry machine-readable market-data evidence.

metric_values.label: Demo / acceptance mission reuse appears in follow-up context
metric_values.note: The follow-up demo / acceptance mission brief should reuse the latest verified stock-scanner mission.

metric_values.label: Actual manager-led mission starts from one user goal
metric_values.note: The target concept requires the owner to state only the goal, then the manager continues the mission flow itself.

metric_values.label: Actual manager-led mission applies persona memory
metric_values.note: The manager must consult persona and memory to derive what matters, not wait for the user to spell out the screening checklist.

metric_values.label: Actual manager-led mission generates its own plan
metric_values.note: The manager must derive the mission brief, criteria, and task graph from memory and context.

metric_values.label: Actual manager-led mission controls workers end-to-end
metric_values.note: The manager must control worker execution, verification, and repair loops instead of delegating to a demo shortcut.

metric_values.label: Actual manager-led mission avoids demo shortcut paths
metric_values.note: The actual mission path must not rely on proving-mission helper runners as the primary execution path.

phase_readiness.note: Docs, examples, and frozen contracts exist.
Manager paths pass, core safety rails are measured, and mission graph plus playbook execution are wired into the live path, but multi-step decomposition is still thin.
Worker fabric is formalized across Claude, Codex, Shell, and Verifier, with artifact lineage and multi-path checkpoint recovery proven in local evidence.
Generic proving mission definitions, acceptance harness runs, adapter selection, and report contracts are all proven without stock-specific manager logic.
The Thai equities daily stock-scanner demo mission is proven as an acceptance harness with success, blocked, retryable, and memory-reuse evidence.
The actual manager-led mission path can start from one goal, apply persona memory, generate its own plan, and control workers without a demo shortcut.
Repeatable one-mission proof still requires repeated actual manager-led runs over the acceptance set.
